channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Republicans stall votes on partisan ICE funding amid party infighting
item.description: Republicans had planned to try to pass a major funding bill for Immigration and Customs Enforcement by the end of the week but plans collapsed over un...

item.title: Forecasters expect slightly fewer hurricanes than usual this year, but the risk of destructive storms is still high
item.description: Forecasters expect 8 to 14 storms will form in the Atlantic between June 1 and November 30. But the danger is more serious than the numbers suggest.

item.title: Democrats sought answers on 2024 failures, but now face more uncertainty
item.description: The Democratic Party requested a review of the 2024 election, but the DNC found the report incomplete and unverifiable, according to chairman Ken Martin.

item.title: Palestinians withdraw bid for senior UN role after US pressure
item.description: The Palestinian delegation to the United Nations abandoned its effort for a top UN job after the US threatened to revoke their visas.
